chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D-55 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 12.03.2026 Mr. Zahid Iqbal, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Abdus Samad, Advocate for NADRA..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. At the very outset learned counsel for the petitioner submits that purpose of filing of this petition has been served, therefore, under instructions he does not press this petition. Learned counsel for the Respondent-NADRA has no objection. Accordingly, the petition stands dismissed as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
